mapper.select: SELECT #{year} AS year, #{month} AS month, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 1 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalIncome, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 2 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalExpense, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 1 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 2 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS balance FROM `transaction` t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.time >= #{startOfMonth} AND t.time < #{startOfNextMonth} AND t.transfer_id IS NULL

SELECT #{year} AS year, NULL AS month, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 1 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalIncome, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 2 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalExpense, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 1 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 2 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS balance FROM `transaction` t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.time >= #{startOfYear} AND t.time < #{startOfNextYear} AND t.transfer_id IS NULL

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 1 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalIncome, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 2 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalExpense FROM `transaction` t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.time >= #{startOfYear} AND t.time < #{startOfNextYear} AND t.transfer_id IS NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
